name: porthole
description: 舷窗 — path-scoped web 介面,跟住在各 repo 裡的 agent 高效溝通

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck
